headline: Paychex (PAYX) Stock Sees Modest Fair Value Lift As Analysts Weigh Paycor Upside
summary: The updated analyst narrative for Paychex centers on a modest lift in fair value estimates, with the price target moving from US$102.07 to US$105.43 per share. That shift lines up with recent research, where some analysts emphasize potential benefits from the Paycor acquisition and dividend support, while others stress execution risk and more cautious long term growth assumptions. As you read on, you will see how these competing views are shaping the evolving story around Paychex and what to...

headline: JP Morgan Maintains Underweight on Paychex, Raises Price Target to $105
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Tien-Tsin Huang   maintains Paychex (NASDAQ:PAYX) with a Underweight and raises the price target from $100 to $105.

headline: PAYX Q4 Earnings Call Flags AI Push, Steady Fiscal 2027 View
summary: Paychex enters fiscal 2027 with cleaner execution, steadier growth, Paycor synergies and WISE AI monetization in focus.

headline: Paychex (PAYX) Stock After 27% Slide Weighing DCF Upside Against Mixed Narratives
summary: With Paychex stock sitting at US$96.38, many investors are asking the same question: is the current price a fair reflection of what the business is worth, or has the market mispriced it? Over the past year, the stock has fallen 27.3%, with year-to-date returns down 11.3%. The shorter term moves show a decline of 1.2% over the last week and 0.6% over the last month, which can change how the market views both risk and potential. Recent coverage of Paychex has focused on how the company is...
